title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 144.745 - Violation not having a specific penalty deemed a misdemeanor
text:
144.745.  Violation not having a specific penalty deemed a misdemeanor. — Any person violating any of the provisions of sections 144.600 to 144.745 for which no criminal penalty is otherwise provided, upon conviction thereof, shall be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor.
(L. 1959 H.B. 35 § 30, A.L. 1974 H.B. 1288)
